attacking_style: Combines early breakaway animation (2km from start) with late tactical finishing kick (300m to go). Capable of controlling race rhythm throughout distance stages before explosive finale.
team_tactics: Insufficient data - only single race observation showing individual initiative in early break formation without clear team setup pattern.
terrain_preference: Climbing terrain - demonstrated ability to clear multiple climbs first while competing for points, maintaining freshness over 170km mountainous stages.
vulnerability: Unknown - single observation shows only strengths; no data on performance under team pressure, time trials, or when break is caught.
key_patterns: Animates early breakaways from race start (2km), establishing position before selection occurs.
Targets intermediate climb points aggressively, clearing all categorized climbs first in stage.
Reserves finishing speed despite long-distance efforts, attacking inside final 300m from small groups.
form_trajectory: unknown: Only single 2017 observation showing winning form, but no progression data available
